title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Mumbai University Global Group

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Mumbai University Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Mumbai University Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Mumbai University Global Group:
Mumbai University Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mumbai University Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
